internal_issues.description: E-PRED-C phantom label in WIN-012 — STALE ISSUE. Already fixed in commit b4fa494 (2026-04-21T06:39Z) before ISS-1325 was opened at 14:30Z. Decider had digested curmudgeon c5 without cross-checking current wins.json state.
E-PRED-C phantom label in WIN-014 — companion finding from analyst EXP-206. SELF-APPLIED: replaced with PRED-TIER-3 language and structural self-contradiction.
Unit conversion error in paragraph (ii): -40 to -60 mGal ≈ 5×10^-5 m/s² (wrong) → 5×10^-4 m/s². Downstream "two orders of magnitude" → "one order of magnitude (~17,700×)". SELF-APPLIED.
WIN-067 detail_extra exposed internal pipeline jargon (c4 advocate, defense_survives=4, GitHub link to .c4.json). All 6 "advocate" references de-jargoned. SELF-APPLIED.
170× vs 1,430× headline mismatch. Partial fix: added explanatory note that 1,430× is apples-to-apples and strengthens 170×. TLDR/finding update still needed.

suggested_patch.replace: Lead with "1,430×" as rigorous apples-to-apples figure, footnote 170× as whole-globe reference

internal_issues.description: V51.1 citation updated (self-applied). Remaining: 9.826 m/s² needs primary source; Domain-4-fails-own-rule at r=20,015 (g=9.7854, 0.476% error violates >0.1% criterion by 4.8×) not yet added; Net-effect false dichotomy needs rescope-retreat closing sentence.

digest_pipeline_bug.description: RECURRING BUG: Decider digested WIN-012.c5 review into new issues (ISS-1325) after b4fa494 had already fixed the E-PRED-C problem. Digest does not cross-check against current wins.json state before creating issues. Result: stale issue + wasted EXP slot (EXP-206). WIN-012.c6 caught this via positive_finding.
digest_pipeline_bug.recommendation: Tinker should audit digest pipeline: add a pre-create check that verifies the flagged text (or condition) still exists in the current wins.json before opening an issue.

breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Tries to Retrofit SG Null as a Prediction — But Its Own 2026 Forecast Says Otherwise
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: WIN-014 cited a fabricated "E-PRED-C" prediction claiming the dome predicts SG null (0.0 µGal) for Aug 2026. There is no such prediction. What the dome actually predicts (PRED-TIER-3) is a 10-13 µGal positive signal — directly contradicting the "null confirms us" narrative. The model cannot simultaneously claim SG nulls confirm it and that SG instruments will show a positive signal in August.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Phantom citation + live self-contradiction: dome's own forward prediction contradicts its own historic WIN.
